name: usefull-agent-skills
description: Reusable Claude Code skills: Atlassian CLI, AWS credential patterns, Databricks CLI, cross-repo epic review, unattended Bash safety, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable skills for Atlassian CLI, AWS, Databricks, and agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: A collection of reusable skills covering Atlassian CLI cross-org workflows, AWS credential resolution, Databricks CLI operations, safe Bash for unattended sessions, cross-repo epic review methodology, and agent memory hygiene.
